chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1293 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on CMA 7284/25 2.For orders on objections 3.For orders on withdrawal statement dt.28.10.2025. 4.For hearing of main case. 29-10-2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. **** By filing urgent application, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
